chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. D – 06 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.237/2024 (Ex.) 3. For orders on MA No.238/2024 (Limitation) 4. For hearing of main case 06.01.2026 This appeal is pending since 2024 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought till date. The appellant has remained unrepresented without any justification from the inception of this appeal and same appears to be the case today. Dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
